author: Tanya B.
pros: It is easy to scan receipts and business cards
cons: pages can sometimes stick together if you're not paying attention

review_title: EXCELLENT tool for a common paper hoarder!
description: Only scanner that I have used or will use due to how easy it is.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The scanner that works with this software is easy to use and easy to install.
cons: Sometimes there are connection issues. Overall, it's workable

description: Holds data effectively hostage and constantly increases subscription cost.
author: Ralph W.
pros: not much. Scans paper and uploads it to the cloud.
cons: There is no functionality to export data other than to export the whole database making it virtually impossible to switch to another system if one has a lot of data.

description: Overall, it's a great product. I have not been using long, but I am more organized than I was before I started using Neat.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I just started using Neat, and I am loving it. It organizes everything, and makes it easy for me to send my information to other software without having to reenter the information. Time saving!
cons: Getting started, for me, was a bit frustrating. I even had a remote access call, and needed more assistance. Of course, I could be a slow learner.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Huge time saver and allows me to get receipts to my accountant quickly and easily via electronic means.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The time saving aspect and keeping receipts organized.
cons: Receipts have to be kept fairly flat, no cruppled papers.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The neat scanner & program is easy to use. We used this program to scan all our documents into digital files. Inexpensive.
cons: The Neat Scanner did have some gliches with shutting down. Customer service was not the most greatest! Very difficult to get speak to someone about issues.

review_title: Works well, but you cannot change the user
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is great quality, makes the pdf's searchable and great to have it cloud based. Easy to organize and save documents based on what it scans.
cons: The desktop to website is slow and clunky. Also we messed up one letter on the email, stuck with it now, cant change it according to support.

description: I use this product daily, very easy to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: scanning, email, mobile, are all vey good.
cons: logging in once ok, then you get kicked out to often and have to do all over again.

description: It is an awesome solution and help to find receipts in a most faster way and no matter hold old it is.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Keeps everything organized, neat and clean. Easy keeping of records.
cons: Takes a while to troubleshoot how to get everything in less pages to print.

review_title: Have the all in one scanner- Good machine
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Have the all-in-one scanner and it works great. Setup was a little tricky with the program I bought it to use with.
cons: A little temperamental. Sometimes I have to reset the machine or the computer to get it to work again.

author: Elizabeth B.
pros: Was able to process 500 business cards in no time to vcards, scan receipts on daily basis, scan documents for clients all the time. This machine is so easy to use. You can change it from 2 sided scan, to a one sided, from color to b/w with just a click of a button. Scans go quickly and easily. On the off-chance one gets hung up the front opens easily and has never shredded my items. Also, love the feature we use at the end of the year to get the sales tax report. Very cool
cons: No cons at this time.

description: I use the app to track all my personal and business expenses. I am a believer.
author: Elwood G.
pros: I have used Neat I think since it came out and rely on it to track my expenses. I find it especially invaluable at tax time.
cons: They recently "upgraded" the app and I was initially not that happy with the changes. I am slowly learning about the changes and getting more comfortable with them.

description: Really saves time instead of me flipping through papers in boxes with a click of a button I can backtrack any documents I may need. Keeps me
author: Evelyn L.
pros: What I enjoy most about this software is that I can log on to my account and I can go searching for any documents that I scanned previously. Keeps me very neat !!
cons: The only cons of this software are that everything is cloud-based since they discontinue the old software.

review_title: Does what I need it to
description: I have had the scanner for over a year now and I am happy with it. I do wish customer support was better and free. This machine did cost a lot of money, and when I need it, I need it. I don't like having to submit a support ticket. I want to be able to talk to a real person on the phone. I would like to see the file menu more user friendly to navigate through my computer's folders when trying to scan something to the PC. It would also be neat if I could click and drag the files to where I need them (contacts, receipts, etc) Lastly, the contact menu should be easier to find. There is no tab for it. Overall, I am happy for what I use it for, these are just suggestions for improvement.
author: Christina A.
pros: Quick and easy scanning.
cons: The navigation through files on my computer when scanning to the computer is not easy nor quick to move through. I would like to see something that is more user friendly. Also, there is no contacts tab so it is difficult to find where I scan all my business cards.

description: It takes very clean scans of Documents, receipts, and ID cards and keeps them neatly organized. I really like being able to rearrange the order of my scans before saving.
author: Sarah M.
pros: The scanning quality is great. It rarely gets paper jams. Being able to rearrange my scans after scanning is complete is a really nice feature.
cons: Needs constant updates, Having to log in after a 5 minute timeout, when I need to constantly scan all day is a real pain.

description: Great! Wonderful for filing all business expenses and retaining copies for reference.
author: Brandy B.
pros: Easy to use and works great with Adobe Reader.
cons: Sometimes the program locks up, but I may have an older copy of the software.

author: Lukas D.
pros: I like that you can organize and file your receipts and documents.
cons: How limited the functionality is and the big differences between the cloud interface and functions and the software itself.

review_title: EASY WAY TO MANAGE ALL DOCS
description: Fast and easy accounting, Quick access to customer records
author: Paul F.
pros: Can create different folders for everything. Quickly scan and upload. just as quickly transfer to Quickbooks for fast and easy accounting.
cons: Would be tough to come up with a Con. About the only thing I can think of would be the slight learning curve on using it. But once you learn, it's easy

description: I have had this software for 13 months. I think its great, and it has done everything i wanted and more. There is a bit of a learning curve, and you should be really good at trouble shooting before giving up. I wish updates were more frequent and more updated each time. Overall, I will keep using Neat now that neat and i have an understanding and i know where its limits are.
author: Traci M.
pros: Its a very well-designed software with lots of potential.
cons: Sometimes it doesnt work. Sometimes i have to fight with it for days to finish a batch. Customer support is quick to blame me for the issues. I lost an entire months work (that was scanned and shredded, and is no longer visible in my neat files. The items are there, the scan is gone.). There seems to be a format gap that has yet to be resolved.

review_title: Wanted a scanning system that eliminated paper clutter. The key is the software.
description: Eliminate paper receipts and to lesser degree some documents.
author: Ronald P.
pros: NEAT is a robust database that allows receipts to stored and creates fields for easy searching. You can also create folders as well for another way of organizing.
cons: Initially NEAT had a computer based software that would sync with their web based software. The computer based software has features that allowed more flexibility in report generation and organization. This was lost when last year NEAT dropped the computer based software.

author: Jay D.
pros: This software helps reduce paper use (receipt scanning function) and reduce negative impact on environment.
cons: The software struggles to recognize information from receipts, so you end up entering the information manually.

description: Recently I switched from a PC to an IMac computer. Neat seemed to work great on the PC, but when I downloaded the driver for Mac, every time I tried to use Neat it started to scan and then shut down. Support said there would be a fix by the first of the month. That was the first of April. It still is not working. I now have a large paper weight on my desk w/the Neat name and logo on it.
author: Richard L.
pros: It's great if it works. Just don't try it on a Mac.
cons: Doesn't work on a Mac computer!

description: This tool works reat with Quickbooks and helps to effectively track all receipts and properly classify the expenses
author: Crystal B.
pros: Reads receipts easily and it is compatible with Quickbooks which fulfills the needs of the office effectively
cons: I only purchased the mobile scanner due to space issues but would love to get the larger version later on

author: Sarah S.
pros: Well, neat lives up to it's name. We use neat for organizing all of our receipts, invoices and packing slips and we create folders so it is very easy to find something!
cons: Honestly, we have only had one problem and I am not sure if it was because of our computer being so old and slow. We found out that a lot of the documents we scanned had actually not scanned or saved, but it was only during that one day we were scanning things in, so it could have been a user error as well.

description: Using neat has been very easy and convenient for organizing digital files, as well as being able to easily send them out in a variety of formats. It has saved time, money, effort, and a lot of frustration.
author: Allison O.
pros: Easy to use.
cons: Sometimes it needs to be closed and reopened
